name: Cauliflower and Three Bell Pepper Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup finely sliced green parts and white parts of green onions
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the Dijon mustard, vinegar (or lemon juice), finely sliced green onion parts, olive oil, salt, and pepper until well combined.
2. Pour the dressing over the cauliflower florets and three bell peppers chopped into bite-sized pieces. Toss gently to coat evenly.
